Why does the casing sometimes separate? Natural collagen casing behaves differently than synthetic. Separation is normal. Where is beef sourced? Regenerative farms in Australia, New Zealand, and the US.

products.name: The Lineage Protein Bar (Mixed Berry)
products.description_text: 20g of grass-fed whey and collagen protein. Under 200 calories. Sweetened with raw honey and coconut nectar. Fat from 100% grass-fed beef tallow. No seed oils, no sugar alcohols, no fiber syrups, no fake fibers, no gums -- just real food, minimally processed. It tastes like something you'd actually want to eat. Rich, satisfying, and easy to digest without the bloating or crash most bars leave behind. Flavored with organic cocoa and freeze-dried fruit, not "natural flavors." Product Type: Protein bar / real-food snack bar Price: $49.99 / 12-pack Subscription available: Yes Allergen: Contains milk Nutrition (per bar): Protein: 20g Calories: 175 Total sugar: 9g Protein per 100 calories: 11.4g Protein System: Grass-fed whey protein concentrate + grass-fed bovine collagen Sweeteners: Organic raw honey + organic coconut nectar syrup Fat source: 100% grass-fed and finished beef tallow Flavor system: Organic wild freeze-dried blueberries, organic freeze-dried strawberries, organic lemon juice, organic raspberry extract Free From: Seed oils, sugar alcohols, gums, emulsifiers, protein isolates, ultra-processed fibers (no agave inulin, no tapioca fiber), artificial sweeteners, artificial flavors, natural flavors, soy, gluten (note: gluten is run in facility with allergen controls) Certifications/Claims: Grass-fed dairy protein, 100% grass-fed and finished collagen and tallow, organic (WPC, honey, coconut nectar, cocoa, berries, lemon juice, raspberry extract), non-GMO, seed oil free, made in USA, high protein What it is: A real-food protein bar delivering 20g of high-quality grass-fed protein in 175 calories. Sweetened with raw honey and coconut nectar. Flavored with organic wild blueberries, strawberries, and raspberry — no artificial flavors, no natural flavor systems. Bound and textured without any processed fibers or gums. Built for people who want a protein bar that tastes genuinely good, digests easily, and is made from ingredients the human body recognizes. Why it exists: The protein bar category has over 10,000 SKUs — and most share the same core problems: low-quality protein sources, sugar alcohols, gums, emulsifiers, seed oils, and ultra-processed binders. A recent peer-reviewed study of more than 1,600 protein bars found many were low in protein quality and bioavailability. The Lineage Bar was built to be the exception: highest proportion of animal-derived ingredients, lowest processing load in the category, and verified protein quality rather than an inflated number. What makes it different: Protein quality — not just protein quantity: Verified Grass-Fed Whey Protein Concentrate & 100% Grass-Finished Collagen. No ultra-processed fibers or binders: Competitors use agave inulin (extracted and refined from agave — many people cannot tolerate more than 2–3g before experiencing gas), tapioca fiber (a refined carbohydrate fraction from cassava), or soluble corn fiber. Lineage uses coconut nectar — the raw sap of the coconut tree — as both a binder and a gentle sweetener. It functions the way a real-food binder would in your own kitchen. Gut-friendly by design: No sugar alcohols (like erythritol) or rare sugars (like allulose). No gums (guar, xanthan, locust bean). No emulsifiers (sunflower or soy lecithin). No inulin. No fiber bombs. These are the ingredients most commonly responsible for bloating, cramping, and GI discomfort in protein bars. Removing them entirely is a formulation choice, not a compromise. Real sweetness from real food: Raw honey provides polyphenols, enzymes, and a lower glycemic impact when paired with protein and fat. Coconut nectar contributes minerals and gentle sweetness without refined sugar. Total sugar per bar: 9g — equivalent to roughly one tablespoon of honey. Lower than every real-food competitor in the category (Jacob: 10g, Prima: 14g). Ancestral fat source: 100% grass-fed and finished beef tallow is the fat source — never seed oils. Tallow provides fat-soluble nutrients, supports a clean blood sugar curve, and delivers stable, satisfying energy. The bar's tallow carries an omega-6 to omega-3 ratio of 1.3:1 — reflective of a genuinely clean, grass-fed supply chain. Flavor from food, not flavor systems: The berry flavor comes exclusively from organic wild freeze-dried blueberries, organic freeze-dried strawberries, organic lemon juice, and organic raspberry extract. No "natural flavors." No flavor systems. No fruit powders stripped of their matrix. Wild blueberries are native to the Pacific Northwest and Canada — not planted and commercially managed, but harvested from natural bush settings free of agrochemicals. Collagen for more than protein count: The collagen in the bar isn't just a cheap protein filler — it contributes Types I and III collagen, supporting joints, tendons, skin elasticity, and gut lining integrity. This is structural nutrition layered into the protein profile rather than a macro trick. Best for: On-the-go protein, post-workout recovery, between-meal satiety, kids lunchboxes, dessert alternative, travel, everyday real-food snacking, people replacing conventional protein bars How to use: Pre-workout (30–60 min before), post-workout (within 30 min), between meals, kids snack, or as a dessert alternative. No usage limit. Storage note: Natural color variation may occur over time due to Maillard reactions between honey and whey protein — a normal indicator of real-food ingredients, not a quality issue. Texture may firm slightly over time as honey interacts with moisture (a natural process, similar to how real fruit changes texture). Store in a cool, dry place. FAQ: Why whey concentrate instead of isolate? Isolates are more heavily processed and lower in naturally occurring micronutrients. WPC retains more of the protein's natural fat and micronutrient profile — more food-like, less supplement-like. I'm sensitive to dairy — can I eat this? Many people react to lactose, gums, or emulsifiers in dairy products, not whey itself. WPC contains significantly less lactose than whole milk, and the bar contains no gums, emulsifiers, or common dairy irritants. Individual responses vary. 100% money-back guarantee if it doesn't work for you. Why is there 9g of sugar if it's "clean"? The sugar comes from raw honey and coconut nectar — real food sources with polyphenols, enzymes, and minerals. This is the equivalent of about one tablespoon of honey per bar. Bars with 0g sugar achieve that via artificial sweeteners or sugar alcohols, which are harder on digestion. Why are the berries wild? Wild blueberries grow natively without being planted or conventionally managed. They carry a broader phytochemical profile than farmed varieties and are harvested free of agrochemicals from the Pacific Northwest and Canada. What is the money-back guarantee? If you don't think this is the best-tasting protein bar you've tried, Lineage offers a 100% refund, no questions asked.
products.best_for: Individuals seeking a high-protein, real-food snack bar without artificial ingredients or digestive discomfort.

products.name: The Lineage Protein Bar (Chocolate)
products.description_text: 20g of grass-fed whey and collagen protein. Under 200 calories. Sweetened with raw honey and coconut nectar. Fat from 100% grass-fed beef tallow. No seed oils, no sugar alcohols, no fiber syrups, no fake fibers, no gums -- just real food, minimally processed. It tastes like something you'd actually want to eat. Rich, satisfying, and easy to digest without the bloating or crash most bars leave behind. Flavored with organic cocoa and freeze-dried fruit, not "natural flavors." Product Type: Protein bar / real-food snack bar Price: $49.99 / 12-pack Subscription available: Yes Allergen: Contains milk Nutrition (per bar): Protein: 20g Calories: 185 Total sugar: 9g Protein per 100 calories: 10.8g Protein System: Grass-fed whey protein concentrate + grass-fed bovine collagen Sweeteners: Organic raw honey + organic coconut nectar syrup Fat source: 100% grass-fed and finished beef tallow Flavor system: Organic cocoa powder (heavy metal, tested), organic cocoa nibs, organic chocolate chips, organic vanilla extract Additional ingredients: Organic coconut flakes, organic macadamia nuts, sea salt Free From: Seed oils, sugar alcohols, gums, emulsifiers, protein isolates, ultra-processed fibers (no agave inulin, no tapioca fiber), artificial sweeteners, artificial flavors, natural flavors, soy, gluten (note: gluten is run in facility with allergen controls) Certifications/Claims: Grass-fed dairy protein, 100% grass-fed and finished collagen and tallow, organic (WPC, honey, coconut nectar, cocoa powder, cocoa nibs, chocolate chips, vanilla), non-GMO, seed oil free, made in USA, high protein What it is: A real-food protein bar delivering 20g of high-quality grass-fed protein in 185 calories. Sweetened with raw honey and coconut nectar. Flavored with organic cocoa powder, organic cocoa nibs, and organic chocolate chips — tested for heavy metals. No artificial flavors. No natural flavor systems. Tastes like chocolate because of actual chocolate, not flavor engineering. Why it exists: The protein bar category is saturated with products that use industrial shortcuts to mimic food. Lineage Chocolate was built to be genuinely indulgent — rich, satisfying, chocolate-forward — using only real food inputs and the lowest processing load in the category. If it tastes like a candy bar, it should be because of real ingredients, not clever chemistry. What makes it different: Protein quality — verified, not implied: The Lineage Bar uses a blend of grass-fed WPC / 100% grass-fed bovine collagen Cocoa that's tested, not just organic: The cocoa powder used in the Chocolate bar is sourced from Ivory Coast, certified organic, and independently tested for heavy metals. Cocoa is a known accumulator of heavy metals from soil — sourcing and testing matter. The cocoa nibs come from Peru, also organic. This is the same standard of ingredient scrutiny applied across the Lineage product line. No ultra-processed fibers or binders: No agave inulin. No tapioca fiber. No soluble corn fiber. Coconut nectar binds the bar the way a real ingredient would — it's the raw sap of the coconut tree, low glycemic, and naturally rich in potassium, magnesium, zinc, iron, calcium, Vitamin C, and B vitamins. A functional ingredient that also contributes nutrition. Gut-friendly by design: No sugar alcohols. No gums. No emulsifiers. No inulin. Every ingredient that typically causes bloating and GI discomfort in protein bars has been deliberately removed. The result is a bar that sits comfortably — no heaviness, no cramping, no crash. Ancestral fat source: 100% grass-fed and finished beef tallow. No seed oils. Tallow from Grassland Tasmania with a 1.3:1 omega-6 to omega-3 ratio — a meaningful marker of genuinely clean, grass-fed sourcing. Stable, nutrient-rich fat that supports satiety and steady energy without blood sugar spikes. Real sweetness: Raw honey and coconut nectar deliver 9g of total sugar per bar — the same as the Mixed Berry, and lower than Prima (14g) or Jacob (10g). No sucralose. No acesulfame-K. No monk fruit extracts. Sweetness that functions like food. Collagen for structure, not just macros: Bovine collagen contributes Types I and III to support joints, connective tissue, skin, and gut lining integrity. It's not in the formula to inflate the protein number — it's there because collagen is genuine nutritional value that whey alone doesn't cover. Best for: Chocolate cravings without compromise, post-workout recovery, daily protein without seed oils or sugar alcohols, dessert alternative, travel, people replacing conventional protein or candy bars How to use: Pre-workout (30–60 min before), post-workout (within 30 min), between meals, kids lunchboxes, travel snack, or as a dessert alternative. No usage limit. Storage note: Natural browning may occur over time from Maillard reactions between honey and whey protein — a normal sign of real-food ingredients. Texture may firm slightly over time as honey interacts with moisture. Store in a cool, dry place. FAQ: Is the chocolate flavor natural or artificial? Entirely natural — organic cocoa powder, organic cocoa nibs, and organic chocolate chips. No "natural flavors." No flavor systems. Is the cocoa tested for heavy metals? Yes — the cocoa powder is independently tested for heavy metals. Cocoa accumulates metals from soil; Lineage tests for this rather than assuming organic certification is sufficient. I usually find chocolate protein bars chalky or artificial-tasting. Why is this different? Most chocolate protein bars use natural flavors or flavor systems to create the taste because their base ingredients don't taste good on their own. Lineage uses actual cocoa powder and cocoa nibs, so the chocolate flavor comes from the real thing — which is why the texture and taste register as food rather than a supplement. Does it contain gluten? No gluten ingredients, but gluten is run in the manufacturing facility with allergen control programs to minimize cross-contamination. What is the money-back guarantee? If you don't love it, 100% refund, no questions asked.

products.name: Strength + Glow Duo
products.description_text: Product Type: Bundle Contents: Grass-Fed Nose-to-Tail Collagen, Creatine Monohydrate + The Frother (free) Retail Value: $117 Bundle Price: $99 Savings: $18 Frother included: Yes (free) Subscription available: Yes What it is: Two of the most impactful daily supplements — collagen and creatine — paired together at a $18 discount with a free frother. Collagen rebuilds the structural tissue that holds you together: skin, joints, tendons, cartilage, and gut lining. Creatine powers every cell that moves: muscles, neurons, and recovery systems. Together they cover strength and structure — inside and out. What's included and why: Grass-Fed Nose-to-Tail Collagen: 16g of grass-fed bovine collagen per scoop — a higher dose than most competing products. Includes trachea, scapula, and eggshell membrane for a full-spectrum collagen profile: Type I (skin, tendons, bone), Type II (joint cartilage, from trachea), and Type III (skin elasticity, connective tissue). Most collagen supplements only provide Type I from bovine hide — ours adds the Types II and III that standard products miss entirely. Eggshell membrane delivers hyaluronic acid and elastin for joint cushioning and skin hydration. 100mg Vitamin C from acerola cherry enhances synthesis and ensures your body actually uses what you're taking. 100mg sea salt supports electrolyte balance. Neutral flavor — dissolves in hot coffee, tea, bone broth, or cold smoothies. Creatine Monohydrate: 5g of 99.9% pure micronized creatine monohydrate per serving, plus sea salt for enhanced absorption — a meaningful addition that most creatine products skip. Creatine is the body's primary fuel for short-burst, high-intensity effort and is also critical for brain ATP production, supporting focus, memory, and mental energy alongside physical performance. Found only in animal foods — but you'd need 2+ lbs of red meat daily to hit the optimal 3–5g therapeutic dose. Supplementation fills the gap efficiently. Tested for glyphosate, pesticides, herbicides, and heavy metals. Zero fillers. The Frother (free): Rechargeable two-speed handheld frother with travel case. Designed for smooth mixing of Lineage's stabilizer-free collagen powder in hot or cold beverages. Under 10 seconds. Washable and travel-ready. How to use together: Daily: 1 scoop Collagen dissolved in morning coffee, tea, or bone broth (use the frother for smooth mixing) Daily: 1 scoop Creatine mixed into any drink — water, the same coffee, or a shake Consistent daily use delivers the best results for both — collagen and creatine work through accumulation, not single-dose effects Top differentiators (bundle-wide): Collagen covers Types I, II, and III — most products only offer Type I Eggshell membrane for hyaluronic acid and elastin — uncommon in collagen supplements 16g collagen per serving — higher dose than most competitors Vitamin C from acerola cherry ensures actual collagen synthesis, not just ingestion Creatine + sea salt absorption advantage — not standard in the category 99.9% pure creatine — no impurities or low-grade blends Both products grass-fed and third-party tested Free frother removes the friction of mixing stabilizer-free collagen daily $18 savings vs. buying individually Best for: People focused on joint health, skin, hair and nails, active women and men, gym-goers, anyone replacing conventional supplements with cleaner options, collagen + creatine daily stack FAQ: Why collagen AND creatine together? They target different systems — collagen rebuilds structural tissue (skin, joints, tendons), creatine powers cellular energy (muscle, brain). Together they're more complete than either alone. Can women take creatine? Yes — creatine benefits strength, cognitive function, and recovery for everyone. Not exclusive to bodybuilders. When do I take each? Both can be taken at any time of day. Many users add collagen to morning coffee and creatine to the same drink or a glass of water. How long until I see results? Collagen benefits typically build over 4–8 weeks of consistent use. Creatine strength improvements often appear within 1–2 weeks, with full saturation in 3–4 weeks. Does collagen need the frother? The frother makes a meaningful difference in texture — collagen has no artificial stabilizers, so it can clump when stirred. The frother is included specifically for this reason.
products.best_for: Individuals looking to enhance their strength and skin health with a combination of collagen and creatine.

Rebuild connective tissue, strengthen muscle, fuel with nose-to-tail protein, and support brain function — all in one clean, tested, grass-fed bundle. Free frother included. Lightly sweetened with coconut sugar only — no artificial sweeteners. Cocoa is lightly alkalized for balanced flavor while preserving polyphenols. Both the protein base and cocoa are tested separately for heavy metals and contaminants at ISO-accredited Light Labs. Delivers Vitamin A, B12, iron, and CoQ10 from liver and heart alongside complete protein. No whey, soy, gums, or allergens. Eggshell membrane provides hyaluronic acid and elastin. 100mg Vitamin C from acerola cherry for synthesis and absorption. Tested for glyphosate, pesticides, and heavy metals. Unflavored — mixes invisibly into any shake. The Frother (free): Rechargeable two-speed frother with travel case. Essential for smooth mixing of ABC Protein and Collagen — both made without artificial stabilizers. Under 10 seconds to a creamy, lump-free shake. How to use together: Morning or post-workout: 1 scoop Chocolate ABC Protein + 1 scoop Collagen + frother = a rich, complete chocolate recovery shake Daily: Add 1 scoop Creatine to the same shake — dissolves invisibly with no flavor impact The three together cover protein synthesis, connective tissue repair, and ATP replenishment in one drink Top differentiators (bundle-wide): Chocolate flavor from organic, Rainforest Alliance Certified Ivory Coast cocoa — not artificial flavoring Coconut sugar only — no artificial sweeteners Cocoa tested independently for heavy metals alongside the protein base Full-spectrum nose-to-tail nutrition: organs, trachea, scapula, eggshell membrane No whey, no dairy allergens, no gums across the entire stack Creatine + sea salt for absorption advantage over standard creatine Free frother removes the friction of mixing stabilizer-free powders $17 savings vs. buying individually Best for: Chocolate shake lovers, post-workout recovery, anyone wanting a complete clean nutrition stack with flavor, people replacing whey protein shakes FAQ: Can I mix all three in one shake? Yes — chocolate protein + collagen + creatine together is the intended daily use. The frother handles all three. Is the chocolate flavor artificial? No — organic Rainforest Alliance Certified cocoa with coconut sugar only. Does creatine affect the chocolate flavor? No — unflavored creatine dissolves without changing taste. Why collagen in a protein bundle? Collagen provides Types I, II, and III for skin, joints, and connective tissue — nutrients that protein powder alone doesn't cover. Together they create a complete recovery stack.

products.description_text: Product Type: Bundle Contents: Animal-Based Complete Protein (Original), Grass-Fed Nose-to-Tail Collagen, Creatine Monohydrate + The Frother (free) Retail Value: $196 Bundle Price: $179 Savings: $17 Frother included: Yes (free) Subscription available: Yes What it is: The complete daily performance stack — protein, collagen, and creatine together in one bundle, with a free frother included. Designed to cover every major pillar of physical performance and recovery: rebuild connective tissue, strengthen muscle, fuel with nose-to-tail protein, and support brain function. Everything in the bundle is grass-fed, third-party tested, and free from artificial additives. Creatine is found only in animal products and supports ATP production in both muscle and brain — improving strength, endurance, cognitive function, and recovery. Sea salt is added to enhance hydration and uptake, a combination uncommon in the creatine category. Tested for glyphosate, pesticides, and heavy metals. No fillers. The Frother (free): Fully rechargeable handheld frother with two speeds and a travel case. Essential for mixing ABC Protein and Collagen smoothly — both are made without artificial stabilizers, which means they clump without a frother. Under 10 seconds to a smooth, frothy consistency. How to use together: Morning: 1 scoop ABC Protein + 1 scoop Collagen mixed with the frother in water, coffee, or a smoothie Daily: 1 scoop Creatine mixed into your shake, water, or bone broth Post-workout: Stack all three for recovery — protein rebuilds muscle, collagen repairs connective tissue, creatine replenishes ATP Top differentiators (bundle-wide): Every product grass-fed and third-party tested — no exceptions Nose-to-tail nutrition across protein and collagen: organs, trachea, scapula, eggshell membrane No whey, no dairy allergens, no gums, no fillers across the entire stack Creatine + sea salt formula for enhanced absorption beyond standard creatine Full-spectrum collagen (Types I, II, III) vs. single-type competitors Free frother solves the no-stabilizer clumping issue out of the box $17 savings vs. buying individually Best for: Athletes, gym-goers, active professionals, anyone building a clean daily nutrition foundation, people replacing whey protein FAQ: Can I take all three together? Yes — they're designed to complement each other. Many customers mix protein and collagen together in one shake. Why unflavored protein in this bundle? Unflavored is the most versatile — mixes cleanly with collagen, smoothies, coffee, or bone broth without flavor conflict. When should I take creatine? Daily — creatine works through saturation over time. Take at any time, with or without food. Does the frother work for all three? Yes — the frother is specifically recommended for both ABC Protein and Collagen due to the no-stabilizer formulas.

products.name: Immunity Support Kit
products.description_text: Product Type: Bundle Contents: 100% Raw Organic & Unfiltered Honey, Grass-Fed Nose-to-Tail Collagen, Rewild Roast Coffee Retail Value: $171 Bundle Price: $161 Savings: $10 Subscription available: Yes What it is: Three products that together support immunity, gut health, and whole-body repair — through the lens of real food, not synthetic supplements. Raw honey provides antimicrobial enzymes, antioxidants, and natural immune support. Collagen rebuilds the gut lining, joints, and structural tissue. Clean coffee delivers antioxidants and sustained energy without the mold and mycotoxins found in conventional beans. A daily ritual that tastes as good as it performs. What's included and why: 100% Raw Organic & Unfiltered Honey: Wild-harvested from remote wilderness hives in Yucatán, Mexico — far from commercial agriculture and human activity. Never heated above 103°F, never pasteurized, never filtered in ways that strip nutrients. Contains naturally occurring enzymes, antioxidants, and antimicrobial compounds that are destroyed in commercial heated honey. Bees are fed only their own honey — no sugar syrup or corn syrup — resulting in a denser, more nutritious product. Third-party tested for glyphosate and 398–450+ contaminants; results show undetectable levels. This matters because even most "organic" US honey tests positive for glyphosate due to bees foraging near conventional farms — remote Yucatán sourcing eliminates this. True-Source Certified. Rich natural sweetness with subtle clover notes. Grass-Fed Nose-to-Tail Collagen: 16g of grass-fed bovine collagen per scoop with trachea, scapula, and eggshell membrane for full-spectrum Types I, II, and III collagen. Collagen is the primary structural protein of the gut lining — supporting gut wall integrity, which is foundational to immune function. Eggshell membrane contributes hyaluronic acid and elastin. 100mg Vitamin C from acerola cherry for collagen synthesis and immune support. Neutral flavor — dissolves in hot coffee, tea, or bone broth without affecting taste. Rewild Roast Coffee: Single-origin medium roast from small family farms in the highlands of Nicaragua. Third-party tested for 405 toxins including mold, mycotoxins, glyphosate, and heavy metals — undetectable results. Grown under native shade trees using regenerative agroforestry practices: compost, cover crops, wild native yeast fermentation, no synthetic fertilizers or pesticides. Roasted in a Loring Smart Roaster for clean energy without bitterness or combustion byproducts. Rich in antioxidants that support brain health, metabolic function, and immune defense. Certified Organic and Fair Trade. Flavor: chocolate, brown sugar, toasted walnut, hint of citrus. The daily ritual: Brew Rewild Roast → stir in a scoop of Collagen (frother recommended for smooth mixing) → sweeten with a drizzle of Raw Honey. A complete morning ritual that covers antioxidant intake, gut structural support, collagen synthesis, and clean sustained energy — in one cup. How each product supports immunity: Honey: raw enzymes, antioxidants, and antimicrobial compounds support immune response and gut microbial health Collagen: rebuilds gut lining integrity — a compromised gut wall is a primary driver of immune dysregulation Coffee (clean): antioxidants in mold-free coffee support cellular defense; mycotoxins in conventional coffee actively suppress mitochondrial and immune function — removing them matters Top differentiators (bundle-wide): Honey tested to undetectable glyphosate levels — rare even among organic brands Collagen provides Types I, II, and III — full gut, joint, and skin structural support Coffee tested for 405 toxins — most coffee is never tested for mold or mycotoxins All three products are third-party tested and regeneratively sourced The bundle creates a functional daily ritual, not just a collection of supplements $10 savings vs. buying individually Best for: Immune health focus, gut health support, people building a clean morning ritual, those replacing conventional coffee and processed sweeteners, whole-food supplement approach, gifting FAQ: Why honey for immunity? Raw honey contains enzymes, antioxidants, and antimicrobial compounds that are destroyed by the heat processing used in commercial honey. Wild-harvested and untouched means these compounds are fully intact. How does collagen support immunity? The gut lining is made primarily of collagen. When it degrades — through poor diet, stress, or age — gut permeability increases and immune function suffers. Rebuilding the lining with collagen supports the gut-immune axis directly. Why does the coffee matter for immunity? Mycotoxins in conventional coffee impair mitochondrial function and can suppress immune response over time. Switching to tested, mold-free coffee removes a daily stressor most people don't know they're experiencing. Can I mix the collagen into the coffee? Yes — and this is the intended use. The collagen dissolves cleanly in hot coffee. Add honey to taste after. Is the honey safe to eat raw? Yes — for adults and children over 12 months. Do not give honey to infants under 12 months due to botulism risk. How long does the honey last? Indefinitely when stored in a cool, dry place. Raw honey does not spoil — crystallization is natural and doesn't affect quality.
products.best_for: Individuals looking for a natural approach to boost immunity and gut health with real food products.

products.name: 100% Air Dried Steak (Variety Pack)
products.description_text: Product Type: Meat snack bundle SKU Category: Air-Dried Steak Contents: One pack each of Classic, Garlic & Onion, and Spicy Southwest air-dried steak Price: $59 Subscription available: No (Add to Cart) Key Ingredients (across all three): 100% grass-fed beef, organic vinegar, sea salt. Flavored varieties add: organic garlic + onion (Garlic & Onion); organic deseeded jalapeño + chipotle (Spicy Southwest) Free From (all three): Sugar, seed oils, preservatives, artificial additives, irradiated spices Spice Standards: Organic, non-irradiated, steam-sterilized Sourced From: Regenerative farms in Australia Drying Method: Slow air-drying over 5–7 days at low temperatures What it is: All three air-dried steak flavors in one pack — the easiest way to experience the full range of Lineage's steak snacks. Whole-cut 100% grass-fed beef, slow air-dried over 5–7 days the ancestral way. Fundamentally different from conventional jerky in texture, taste, and ingredient quality. What's included: Classic: Grass-fed beef, vinegar, and sea salt — nothing else. Three ingredients. The full flavor of well-raised beef concentrated through slow air-drying. Naturally tender, deeply savory, no sugar needed. Garlic & Onion: The Classic base seasoned with organic garlic and onion. Savory, familiar depth that complements the beef without masking it. A crowd-pleaser across palates. Spicy Southwest: Bold chili heat from organic deseeded jalapeño and chipotle. Seeds removed to eliminate lectins and bitter compounds — delivering clean warmth with better digestibility. Flavor from the pepper flesh, not the seeds. Why air-dried steak, not jerky: Jerky is cooked or dehydrated at high heat — this toughens the meat and often requires sugar or heavy marinades to compensate for texture and flavor loss. Air-drying at low temperatures over 5–7 days preserves the meat's natural tenderness, concentrates umami, and keeps the full amino acid profile and natural fats intact. The result tastes like actual steak — not a processed snack product. Top differentiators (all varieties): Whole muscle cuts — not ground, formed, or extruded 5–7 day slow air-drying at low temperature: tender texture, full nutrient retention Zero sugar across all three flavors (most jerky relies on sugar to compensate for processing) Organic, non-irradiated, steam-sterilized spices (flavored varieties) Deseeded peppers in Spicy Southwest — removes lectins and gut irritants rare in the category Natural fats intact: supports satiety without energy crashes Shelf-stable for months; refrigerate after opening Made by Dr. Paul Saladino and Dr. Anthony Gustin Best for: Steak and savory snack lovers, high-protein snackers, new Lineage customers, gifting, travel, flavor comparison How to use: Eat straight from pack, pair with cheese or fruit, keep in bag for travel and long days. FAQ: How is this different from jerky? Jerky uses high heat and usually sugar to compensate. Our steak is slow air-dried at low temp — no sugar, more tender, better nutrient retention. Which flavor should I start with? Classic if you want the purest beef experience; Garlic & Onion for savory depth; Spicy Southwest for heat with complexity. Is this a whole cut of steak? Yes — whole muscle beef, not ground and formed like most meat sticks. Does it need refrigeration? No — shelf-stable until opened. Refrigerate after opening for longer storage. Where is the beef from? Regenerative farms in Australia.
products.best_for: Individuals looking for a variety of high-quality, air-dried steak snacks made from 100% grass-fed beef.

Independent verification that the honey is ethically and transparently sourced and free from contaminants.

products.name: 100% Grass-Fed Beef Tallow
products.description_text: Product Type: Cooking fat Format: Jar Sold in: 3-packs or 6-packs Price: $45 (subscribe & save: $40.50) Subscription available: Yes Key Attributes: 100% grass-fed and grass-finished beef tallow Rendering Method: Wet rendering (steam-jacketed kettles at 190–220°F) Filtration: Triple-filtered for purity Smoke Point: 420°F+ Nutrients: Fat-soluble vitamins A, D, E, K; stearic acid; CLA Free From: Bleaching agents, deodorizers, solvents, artificial processing Storage: Shelf-stable at room temperature for months; refrigerate or freeze for extended storage Sourced From: Small regenerative family farms (grass-fed, grass-finished) What it is: Premium beef tallow from 100% grass-fed, grass-finished beef — slowly wet-rendered at low temperatures and triple-filtered for purity. No burnt flavors. No nutrient degradation. A clean, high-heat cooking fat that's naturally shelf-stable. Top differentiators: Wet rendering (not dry): uses steam-jacketed kettles at 190–220°F vs. commercial dry rendering at 250–300°F — prevents oxidation, preserves nutrients, eliminates burnt flavor Triple-filtration: removes all impurities, proteins, and residues — crystal clear result 100% grass-fed AND grass-finished: full spectrum of fat-soluble vitamins No bleaching, deodorizing, or solvents (common in commercial tallow) 420°F+ smoke point — safe for frying, roasting, sautéing Natural shelf stability — no refrigeration required Made by Dr. Paul Saladino and Dr. Anthony Gustin Best for: High-heat cooking, butter replacement, seed oil alternative, baking, natural skin moisturizer How to use: Frying, roasting, sautéing, baking (pie crusts, biscuits), or topical skin application. FAQ: What's the difference between wet and dry rendering? Wet uses steam at low heat — no scorching, no nutrient loss, cleaner taste. Dry uses direct heat at high temps, degrading fats and producing off-flavors. Does it need refrigeration? No — naturally shelf-stable at room temperature for months. Why only 3- or 6-packs? Better value, reduced shipping cost; tallow stores indefinitely so bulk makes sense. What does it taste like? Mild, clean beef flavor — versatile for savory and sweet dishes.
products.best_for: Individuals looking for a clean, high-heat cooking fat with preserved nutrients.
